description: Safety net for when input_select.hvac_season reverts to its initial: Off value after an HA update or restart, while input_text.hvac_season_persisted (mirrored by automation.hvac_persist_season on every change) survives. Fires once per HA start and runs the choose block immediately — no wait_for_trigger, because the persisted helper restores from the recorder before this automation registers, and the choose condition already filters out unknown/unavailable values (they would simply no-op). Must run fast: hvac_apply_mode reacts to the bogus Off state and turns off the mini-splits, so any delay here is a delay before they get turned back on.
